claim_text: RUN010 completed 125 cases and all were overall valid.
RUN010 Tmax_global_C ranged from 67.397 to 134.974 degC.
RUN010 had no thermal_risk_case in the global diagnostic risk zone.
RUN010 global risk-zone counts were safe 119, attention 4, and warning 2.
notes: Diagnostic risk zoning only; not IEC/IEEE limit

claim_text: RUN010 maximum contact-layer temperature was 129.925 degC.
RUN010 increased Tmax_global_C over RUN008 by a mean of 0.617 degC.
notes: Maximum delta=2.816 degC; changed risk zones=2

claim_text: RUN011A medium-versus-fine maximum Tmax_global error was 0.355%.
RUN011B sensitivity ranking was tan_delta > epsr > Rc0 > h_air > k_RIP > h_oil.
notes: tan_delta_multiplier > epsr_RIP > Rc0_multiplier > h_air > k_RIP_multiplier > h_oil

claim_text: DIELECTRIC_LOSS_REVIEW_REQUIRED was retained because field-coupled RIP dielectric loss exceeded the average-field reference, but it was not treated as model failure.
Contact-resistance degradation was represented as a parameterized equivalent model, not as a measured defect.
